SELECT account_id
FROM account
WHERE account_id IN (
    SELECT account_id
    FROM disp
    WHERE client_id IN (
        SELECT client_id
        FROM client
        WHERE gender = 'F'
        AND birth_date = (
            SELECT MIN(birth_date)
            FROM client
            WHERE gender = 'F'
        )
    )
)
AND account_id IN (
    SELECT account_id
    FROM disp
    WHERE client_id IN (
        SELECT client_id
        FROM client
        WHERE district_id IN (
            SELECT district_id
            FROM district
            WHERE A11 = (
                SELECT MIN(A11)
                FROM district
            )
        )
    )
)
UNION
SELECT

SELECT SUM(M.home_team_goal)
FROM Match M
JOIN Team T ON M.home_team_api_id = T.team_api_id
JOIN (
    SELECT P.player_api_id, P.birthday
    FROM Player P
    JOIN (
        SELECT player_api_id, player_positions
        FROM Player_Attributes
        WHERE date = (
            SELECT MAX(date)
            FROM Player_Attributes
            WHERE player_api_id = P.player_api_id
        )
    ) PA ON P.player_api_id = PA.player_api_id
) P ON
    M.home_player_1 = P.player_api_id OR
    M.home_player_2 = P.player_api_id OR
    M.home_player_3 = P.player_api_id OR
    M.home_player_4 = P.player_api_id OR
    M.home_player_5 = P.player_api_id OR
    M.home_player_6 = P.player_api_id OR
    M.home_player_7 = P.player_api_id OR
    M.home_player_8 = P.player_api_id OR
    M.home_player_9 = P.player_api_id OR
    M.home_player_10 = P.player_api_id OR
    M.home_player_11 = P.player_api_id
WHERE (julianday('now') - julianday(P.birthday)) / 365.25 <= 30	----- bird -----	european_football_2

1127:
SELECT
    p.player_name,
    c.name AS country
FROM
    Player p
JOIN
    Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
JOIN
    Match m ON p.player_api_id IN (
        m.home_player_1, m.home_player_2, m.home_player_3, m.home_player_4, m.home_player_5,
        m.home_player_6, m.home_player_7, m.home_player_8, m.home_player_9, m.home_player_10,
        m.home_player_11, m.away_player_1, m.away_player_2, m.away_player_3, m.away_player_4,
        m.away_player_5, m.away_player_6, m.away_player_7, m.away_player_8, m.away_player_9,
        m.away_player_10, m.away_player_11
    )
JOIN
    Team t ON m.home_team_api_id = t.team_api_id OR m.away_team_api_id = t.team_api_id
JOIN
    League l ON m.league_id = l.id
JOIN
    Country c ON l.country_id = c.id
WHERE
    pa.vision > 89
GROUP BY
    p.player_name, c.name;	----- bird -----	european_football_2

1481:
SELECT
    (SELECT AVG(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
     JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
     WHERE customers.Segment = 'SME' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND substr(Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
     AND Consumption = (SELECT MIN(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
                        JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
                        WHERE customers.Segment = 'SME' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND substr(Date, 1, 4) = '2013'))
    -
    (SELECT AVG(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
     JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
     WHERE customers.Segment = 'LAM' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND substr(Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
     AND Consumption = (SELECT MIN(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
                        JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
                        WHERE customers.Segment = 'LAM' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND substr(Date, 1, 4) = '2013')) AS SME_LAM_diff,

    (SELECT AVG(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
     JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
     WHERE customers.Segment = 'LAM' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND substr(Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
     AND Consumption = (SELECT MIN(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
                        JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
                        WHERE customers.Segment = 'LAM' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND substr(Date, 1, 4) = '2013'))
    -
    (SELECT AVG(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
     JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
     WHERE customers.Segment = 'KAM' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND substr(Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
     AND Consumption = (SELECT MIN(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
                        JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
                        WHERE customers.Segment = 'KAM' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND substr(Date, 1, 4) = '2013')) AS LAM_KAM_diff,

    (SELECT AVG(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
     JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
     WHERE customers.Segment = 'KAM' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND substr(Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
     AND Consumption = (SELECT MIN(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
                        JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
                        WHERE customers.Segment = 'KAM' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND substr(Date, 1, 4) = '2013'))
    -
    (SELECT AVG(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
     JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
     WHERE customers.Segment = 'SME' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND substr(Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
     AND Consumption = (SELECT MIN(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
                        JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
                        WHERE customers.Segment = 'SME' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND substr(Date, 1, 4) = '2013')) AS KAM_SME_diff	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1482:
SELECT
    c.Segment,
    (SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
     SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
    SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) * 100 AS PercentageIncrease
FROM
    customers c
JOIN
    yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
WHERE
    c.Currency = 'EUR'
    AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
GROUP BY
    c.Segment
ORDER BY
    PercentageIncrease DESC, PercentageIncrease ASC
LIMIT 2;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

FROM yearmonth C12
JOIN yearmonth C13 ON C12.CustomerID = C13.CustomerID
JOIN transactions_1k T ON C12.CustomerID = T.CustomerID
WHERE C12.Date LIKE '2012%' AND C13.Date LIKE '2013%'
AND T.Date = '2012-08-25' AND T.Amount * T.Price = 634.8	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

FROM "transactions_1k"
JOIN products ON "transactions_1k".ProductID = products.ProductID

1531:
SELECT
    c.CustomerID,
    c.Currency,
    SUM(t.Price) / SUM(t.Amount) AS AvgPricePerItem,
    SUM(t.Price) AS TotalSpending
FROM
    transactions_1k t
JOIN
    customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
GROUP BY
    c.CustomerID, c.Currency
ORDER BY
    TotalSpending DESC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
